We're hiring a Senior Software Engineer and Software Engineer to join our team! Learn more and apply here.

Anton Watson

Position: Forward

6-8, 225lb (203cm, 102kg)

Hometown: Spokane, WA

High School: Gonzaga Prep

RSCI Top 100: 48 (2019)

School: Gonzaga (Men)

Draft: Boston Celtics, 2nd round (24th pick, 54th overall), 2024 NBA draft

  • 2023-24 All-WCC
  • 2x All-WCC Tourney
Become a Stathead & surf this site ad-free.
